context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of Native-Surface Multi-Lens Evaluator Panel. Sprint 1 (commit 0dc9cd8) created skills/shared/lens-panel.md (canonical protocol + verbatim fragments), added optional lensVerdicts to EvalResultSchema, and a drift gate. Sprint 2 teaches the bober-evaluator AGENT a prompt-level MODE (full | deterministic | lens:<name>) so it can run as today's full evaluator (default, byte-identical), a deterministic-only strategy runner, or a single-lens qualitative judge that emits a per-lens verdict. The .claude/agents copy is synced and gated against drift.

completedSprints.title: Canonical panel reference + lensVerdicts schema field + drift gate
completedSprints.summary: skills/shared/lens-panel.md (split fan-out + majority-vote/fail-closed + lensVerdicts shape + 4 verbatim lens fragments); optional lensVerdicts on EvalResultSchema; src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts drift gate (uses resolveLensFocus). Commit 0dc9cd8.

gitNote: Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes exist in the working tree. Stage ONLY this sprint's files with explicit paths: git add agents/bober-evaluator.md .claude/agents/bober-evaluator.md src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts (or a new src/orchestrator/agent-sync.test.ts if you add one). NEVER `git add -A`/`git add .`. CRITICAL: agents/bober-evaluator.md and .claude/agents/bober-evaluator.md must end up BYTE-IDENTICAL (the .claude copy is a straight copy of the source). The MODE section must be ADDITIVE — do not change any existing instruction prose. Branch bober/evaluator-lens-panel — never main.
